title: Borreria multiflora
taxonomy: Borreria multiflora is classified within the family Rubiaceae, which comprises a large group of flowering plants commonly known as coffee or madder family. This plant belongs to the genus Borreria, which consists of various species of flowering plants. The classification of Borreria multiflora is further divided into the subfamily Rubioideae, making it a member of the large and diverse Rubiaceae family. Borreria multiflora is a species of flowering plant native to tropical and subtropical regions, adding to the diversity of the Rubiaceae family. The classification of Borreria multiflora is a reflection of its complex evolutionary history and its position within the Rubiaceae family.
